Connected Champions.value: Anne Tam, Bindu Krishna, Linda Guerrero, Luz Santana, Nilesh Murthy, Prasanna Vijayanathan, Bindu Krishna (D)

CPC What skill did you cover.value: We talked about Nilesh's job, which is selling used things. | Communication | Communication | Planning | Planning | Planning | Organziation | Organization | Resume Writing | session was focused on creating community | SMART goals/ CLEAR (emotional intelligence) | Communication/Collaboration | Professional attainment | How to improve on a resume and the different components

CPC What component skill did you cover.value: Talked about career options | Eye contact and body language | Face to face, email, and phone communication | Time Management | Preparation of Materials | Support System for Additional Help | How do you organize yourself?? | Your work space | Adding skills that we covered that match with their strengths. | Goals/objectives and emotional intelligence | emotional awareness, listening and sharing information | organizational skills | resume writing

CPC Discussion topics.value: Career, software/hardware engineering, jobs, community college, favorite subject is Math | How you communicate with your whole face. How it is important to look at people as you speak to them. | What communication skill is the easiest and hardest. Also what type of communicator do you want to be: good, great, or skilled communicator. | Time Management at work, school, and home. We also discussed the importance of time management in resume and applications. | Sharing in an interview how we are prepared for success in home, school, and work. We also discussed how to add to resume good preparation skills and give examples. | Being able to share during a job interview why I should be hired. | Sharing if you are a great in organization how you highlight it in an interview. Also if they ask you what is an area you are weak in and organization is area share how you have worked to improve this with detailed examples. | How your work space, work ethic, and work attitude will impact those around you? | Opportunities to volunteer in the community to add to resume. | diversity of nursing field | How to set smart goals while also connecting them to C (collaboration with stakeholders), L (listening to others with experience), E (Empathy for self), A ( adaptable (readjustment of goals/times as needed), R (rewards/ recognitions for self) | career pathways and anatomy of a nurse (skills to use while at work) | advanced nursing studies, practice and goal setting. | Presented a slide deck on what is a resume and why it is important.  Showed examples of improved writing for the resume

CPC Why.value:
It was good to meet Ehsan and Matti. | My intern was very engaged in the questions I asked. She had great eye contact and shared her story and who she is and things she is concern about. | I was able to hear about how my Interns communicated during their interviews for jobs. | We discussed time management strengths and weaknesses together . | We discussed how interns are prepared for school, home, or work. All interns shared good examples of how they are prepared | It was difficult because on internet connection at home for one intern. | Very engaging conversations about organization in their personal life, work, and school. | How do your organize your work area? | We were working on adding skills and updating resume. | We all shared something about ourselves and learned about why I choose nursing as a career. | The interns responded well to the information shared and was able to come to them to personal
Experiences | I was able to explore the nursing career pathway with the interns | the interns engaged very well, shared experienced and were able to relate to the discussion. | 2 out of the 3 students were not actively engaged

CPC Resume additions.value: Nothing | Communication | Good Communicator, Great Communicator, or Skilled Communicator | Time Management | Preparing for Success and Preparation of Materials. | Supportive and Collaborative | Organization Skills | Organizational Skills | Skills and Awards given | No | no. | We started working on elevating their resume

CPC Anything else.value: Interns were open with sharing their job interview feedback and discuss strengths and difficulties with communication. I also shared how to ask people if they would not mind speaking slowly and re-stating their question or comment to make sure they understood something. One intern shared how she just agrees sometimes because she doesn't understand. | looking forward to next session
